texto: After his failed political career, Lincoln often pondered the question of the purpose of the meaning of life. In 1850 [ten years before he was elected President], Lincoln told Herdon [his law partner] "How hard, oh how hard it is to die and leave one's country no better than if one had never lived.
explicacao: Citação de Ronald C. White Jr. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “After his failed political career, Lincoln often pondered the question of the purpose of the mean…” articula reflexao, a-lincoln, history em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e history.
